title: Hexeal White Vinegar 5L – 5L of Food Grade White Vinegar for Cooking, Cleaning, Pickling & Baking – Cleans Surfaces, Deodorises & Removes Grime
features: MAKE KITCHENS & BATHROOMS SPARKLE: White Vinegar is a powerhouse product in cleaning the home. Use White Vinegar on porcelain, countertops, stainless steel appliances, oven and microwave interiors, laminate flooring, toilets, glass surfaces, tiles, wooden furniture, dishwashers, washing machines and more. This product is already diluted, ready-to-go for cleaning immediately. Please note White Vinegar should not be used to clean marble.

KINDER ALTERNATIVE TO HARSHER PRODUCTS: Practical and suitable for home, commercial and industrial use. You can use White Vinegar as an effective drain cleaner when mixed with baking soda, add to laundry loads for soft, odour-free clothing or even for removing stains on clothing, carpets and upholstery. White Vinegar can also be used to repel insects such as ants and spiders. Best of all, having a universal cleaner also means less packaging and plastic!

VERSATILE COOKING INGREDIENT: White Vinegar is a fantastic component for making sugary sauces with depth like barbecue sauce, or flavourful sauces like chimichurri. When used in marinades for protein, it can also help to tenderise meat while enhancing taste. Use White Vinegar to enhance pie crusts, make fluffier rice, hold the texture of boiled potatoes as well as make delicious vinaigrettes and salad dressings.

FOR PICKLING & PRESERVING: White Vinegar can be used in various ways around the kitchen. It is the key to pickling condiments such as onions, gherkins and cabbage for extra texture, sweet flavour and subtle notes not found in raw or cooked produce. You can also soak fresh produce in equal parts water and White Vinegar to preserve and extend the shelf life of fruit and veg. This helps food to last longer by removing bacteria from the surface.

TRUSTED BRITISH COMPANY EST. 2009: Hexeal is a small and independent local UK business based in the quiet Norfolk countryside. We pride ourselves on safe, practical and high-quality products fit for home, personal, commercial and industrial use.
description: Product Description Suitable for... Cooking & Pickling A strong all-rounder in the kitchen, use White Vinegar to pickle tasty vegetables, preserve produce, bake great textured sweet and savoury treats, cook tender meat and make delicious marinades. Preserving Use White Vinegar to eliminate wax or bacteria from fresh produce to extend the shelf life, enjoy natural, tasty flavours and make your food last even longer. Cleaning Use to disinfect, clean and leave objects sparkling. White Vinegar is especially useful on windows and glass surfaces, reducing grime, grease and dirt when wiped, leaving a nice streak-free shine, leaving your surfaces crystal clear. White Vinegar by Hexeal Trusted British company established in 2009 Hexeal is a small and independent local UK business based in the quiet Norfolk countryside. We pride ourselves on safe, practical and quality-graded chemical products fit for home, commercial and industrial use. Food Grade White Vinegar 5% White Vinegar for industrial, commercial and personal use White Vinegar has many practical uses. For cleaning, it can deodorise, clean grime and disinfect, while for cooking it can be used to pickle, preserve or enhance texture in baking. Please note our products are not expirable but we recommend use within 12 months.
